# IndemnityInsurance.co.nz — LLMs.txt

> Professional indemnity and liability insurance information and broker referral service for New Zealand professionals and businesses.

IndemnityInsurance.co.nz is an information and lead-referral website for professional indemnity (PI) insurance and related liability insurance covers in New Zealand. It is not a licensed financial adviser or insurer. All insurance referrals are directed to licensed NZ insurance advisers regulated under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013.

## About This Site

- **Service**: General information and broker referral for professional indemnity insurance in New Zealand
- **Target market**: NZ-based professionals, contractors, sole traders and businesses requiring PI and liability insurance
- **Referral partners**: Licensed NZ insurance advisers and brokers (Cover4You)
- **Contact**: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- **Not regulated**: IndemnityInsurance.co.nz is NOT regulated under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 as a financial advice provider. Only the referred advisers are regulated.
- **Authors**: James Whitfield (Insurance Adviser, Cover4You, 10+ years experience) and Sarah Thompson (Insurance Content Specialist)

## Key Pages

### Core Information
- [Homepage](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/): Professional indemnity insurance NZ — overview, coverage types, professions, costs
- [What Is PI Insurance?](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professional-indemnity-insurance/): Complete guide to professional indemnity insurance in NZ
- [PI Insurance Cost NZ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/pi-insurance-cost/): Average costs by profession, cover level and business size
- [Indemnity Insurance for Contractors](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/indemnity-insurance-for-contractors/): PI insurance for NZ contractors, sole traders and freelancers
- [Statutory Liability Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/statutory-liability-insurance/): Defence costs for NZ statutory prosecutions (H&S, RMA, Companies Act)
- [Employers Liability Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/employers-liability-insurance/): ACC-gap cover for employee claims not covered by ACC
- [Run-Off Cover Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/run-off-cover-insurance/): PI tail cover for retiring or departing NZ professionals
- [Compare Providers](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/compare/): QBE, Dual, BHSI, Vero and AIG NZ comparison
- [FAQ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/faq/): Frequently asked questions about PI insurance in NZ
- [About Us](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/about/): About IndemnityInsurance.co.nz
- [Get a Quote](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/contact/): Quote request form — refers to a licensed NZ adviser

### Coverage Types
- [Professional Indemnity Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/professional-indemnity/): Negligence, errors, advice failures — the core PI cover
- [Public Liability Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/public-liability/): Third-party bodily injury and property damage
- [Statutory Liability Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/statutory-liability/): Defence costs for statutory prosecution
- [Employers Liability Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/employers-liability/): ACC-gap employee injury claims
- [Directors & Officers Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/directors-officers/): D&O personal liability cover for NZ directors
- [Management Liability Insurance](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/management-liability/): Combined D&O, EPL, statutory and employers liability
- [Run-Off Cover](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/coverage/run-off-cover/): Extended reporting period / tail cover

### Profession Guides
- [Accountants & Bookkeepers](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/accountants/): CAANZ practising requirement; tax error and audit exposure
- [Architects & Engineers](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/architects-engineers/): Architects Act 2022 mandatory; construction defect risk
- [IT Consultants](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/it-consultants/): System failure, data breach, project delivery risk
- [Financial Advisers](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/financial-advisers/): FMCA FAP licence mandatory; investment advice exposure
- [Real Estate Agents](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/real-estate-agents/): REA/REINZ standards; misrepresentation risk
- [Management Consultants](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/consultants/): Strategic and operational advice risk
- [Healthcare Practitioners](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/healthcare/): Medico-legal and professional registration board requirements
- [Mortgage Brokers](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professions/mortgage-brokers/): FMCA; high transaction value exposure

### High-Intent Commercial Landing Pages
- [PI Insurance Auckland](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/pi-insurance-auckland/): PI insurance for Auckland professionals — financial advisers, accountants, engineers, IT
- [PI Insurance Wellington](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/pi-insurance-wellington/): PI insurance for Wellington professionals — government contractors, consultants, advisers
- [PI Insurance Christchurch](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/pi-insurance-christchurch/): PI insurance for Canterbury professionals — construction, engineering, professional services
- [PI for Sole Traders NZ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professional-indemnity-insurance-sole-traders-nz/): Professional indemnity for NZ sole traders, freelancers and self-employed professionals
- [Compare PI Insurance NZ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/compare-professional-indemnity-insurance-nz/): How to compare PI insurance policies in NZ — what to look for
- [Professional Liability Insurance NZ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/professional-liability-insurance-nz/): NZ professional liability insurance explained — PI, PL and management liability
- [Indemnity Insurance Small Business NZ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/indemnity-insurance-small-business-nz/): PI insurance for NZ small businesses and SMEs
- [PI for Government Contractors NZ](https://www.indemnityinsurance.co.nz/pi-insurance-government-contractors-nz/): PI requirements for NZ government procurement and contract work

## NZ PI Insurance Market Context

**Average costs (BizCover NZ FY2024, 4,000+ businesses):**
- Overall average: $85–$86/month across all professions
- Architects & Engineers: $160–$300/month (highest risk; long limitation periods)
- Mortgage Brokers: $115–$200/month (FMCA regulatory risk)
- Financial Advisers: $100–$200/month (FMCA mandatory)
- IT Consultants: $80–$150/month
- Accountants: $75–$120/month (CAANZ mandatory)
- Management Consultants: $65–$130/month
- Recruitment Consultants: $115–$200/month
- Real Estate Agents: $90–$160/month
- Marketers/PR: $65–$100/month (lowest risk)

**Key NZ market insurers:** QBE, Dual (Howden), BHSI (Berkshire Hathaway Specialty Insurance), Vero (Suncorp), AIG NZ

**Mandatory PI professions (NZ law):**
- Financial Advisers: FMCA FAP licence condition
- Accountants: CAANZ practising certificate requirement
- Real Estate Agents: REA/REINZ standards
- Lawyers: Law Society practising certificate
- Architects: Architects Act 2022
- Engineers: Mandatory cover announced November 2025, effective 2026
- Healthcare practitioners: Most HPCA registration board requirements
- Mortgage Brokers: FMCA FAP licence condition

**Policy basis:** Claims-made (not occurrence). The active policy at the time of claim responds, not the policy at time of work.

**Cover levels available:** $250,000 / $500,000 / $1M / $2M / $5M / $10M+ per claim

**Most popular limit:** $1M per claim — covers most NZ contract requirements and professional board minimums.

**Typical excess:** $1,000–$10,000 depending on profession and cover level. Some policies include defence costs within the limit of liability; others provide defence costs in addition.

**Retroactive date:** Claims-made policies include a retroactive date — the earliest date from which prior work is covered. Continuous PI cover preserves retroactive date history; gaps can create coverage gaps for past work.

**Run-off cover:** Essential for professionals retiring, selling a business, or winding down. Provides continued coverage for claims arising from past work after an active policy lapses.

## Regulatory Notice

IndemnityInsurance.co.nz is an information and referral service only. It is NOT regulated under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 as a financial advice provider. No content on this website constitutes financial advice. The licensed NZ insurance advisers we refer enquiries to are regulated under the FMCA and must comply with the Code of Professional Conduct for Financial Advice Services.

*Last updated: 2026-05-23*
